title: Create Cobblemon Legends
description: A mostly kitchen sink style pack with a focus on Cobblemon, Create, Farmer's Delight and a handful of building & worldgen mods. Several utility/QoL mods also make the MC grind much less painful.
body:
# Create Cobblemon Legends (CCL)

CCL aims to provide a [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) & [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) experience geared towards less grind and more building. The pack is mostly designed for singleplayer or small multiplayer servers.

## IMPORTANT! Please Read

If you are having issues starting the pack it may be because CCL uses [Mod Sets](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-sets) to customize which mods load and which don't. Unfortunately this can at times conflict when updating the pack as a mod can get added which depends on one that is currently disabled. If the pack ever becomes unable to launch try replacing the `config/modsets/disabled_mods.json` file with one of the following:

<details>
<summary>Server Mods Disabled (default)</summary>
[
    "vmp",
    "chunky",
    "chunkyborder"
]
</details>


<details>
<summary>All mods enabled</summary>
[
]
</details>

CCL comes with a number of opinionated QoL, Utility & Enhancement mods. If you'd like to disable any of these mods but aren't confident in which ones you may need/want to disable please take a look at our [Mod Sets](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-sets) configuration. Mod Sets is an in-game mod enabler/disabler that we have configured to help personalize your experience with this modpack.
